# UX Checklist: Fall Back to Straight-Line Distance When Routing Fails

**Purpose**: Validate user-facing warnings and confidence changes for fallback.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/027-straight-line-fallback/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Warning Presentation

- [x] CHK-UX-001 Routing fallback warning is visible on estimate results.
- [x] CHK-UX-002 Mixed-mode indicator appears when some targets use fallback.
- [x] CHK-UX-003 Confidence reduction is visible when fallback is used.

## Consistency & Accessibility

- [x] CHK-UX-004 Labels align with shared naming conventions ("Routing fallback", "Straight-line distance").
- [x] CHK-UX-005 Basic accessibility pass (keyboard navigation + contrast) is part of UX gate.
